# UC-15.4.1 · APC UPS SNMP Remaining Runtime Below Threshold

## Description

Low remaining runtime during utility loss leaves no margin for generator start or orderly shutdown.

## Value

Prevents data loss and hardware damage during brownouts.

## Implementation

(1) Poll UPS-MIB runtime remaining. (2) Set threshold to site generator profile. (3) Page datacenter lead.

## SPL

```spl
index=power sourcetype="snmp:apc:ups" earliest=-1h
| eval runtime_min=tonumber(coalesce(upsAdvBatteryRunTimeRemaining, upsEstimatedMinutesRemaining, battery_runtime_min, ""))
| eval load_pct=tonumber(coalesce(upsAdvOutputLoad, upsOutputPercentLoad, ""))
| where isnotnull(runtime_min) AND runtime_min < 8
| table _time ups_name host runtime_min load_pct
```

## Visualization

Single value min runtime; trend line.

## References

- [Schneider Electric — APC product support](https://www.se.com/ww/en/product-category/3100-2000-pdu/)
- [Splunk Connect for SNMP](https://splunkbase.splunk.com/apps#/search=connect%20for%20snmp)
